description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named macOS CI that runs on push, pull request, and workflow dispatch events. Use a macos-latest job that checks out the repository, installs Qt 6.9.0 with qtimageformats module, installs Conan and dependencies including exiv2/0.28.3, builds the project using CMake with Conan presets, and deploys it as a macOS bundle using macdeployqt. Upload the resulting .dmg file as an artifact.
